name: chat2skill
description: Automatically learn and retrieve coding-agent memory and skills through the unified Memory-backed Chat2Skill API and enforce learned hard response constraints.

interface.shortDescription: Learn and retrieve memory and skills from agent conversations.
interface.longDescription: Chat2Skill captures conversations after each session, sends local memory and skill state to the unified Chat2Skill cloud API, stores returned memory deltas under ~/.chat2skill/contexts and learned skills under ~/.chat2skill/skills, injects relevant project memory plus skills into new conversations, and uses Stop hooks to enforce learned hard wording constraints before a turn ends.
defaultPrompt: Use Chat2Skill to retrieve relevant learned skills for this task.
Update Chat2Skill from the latest session.
Show me where Chat2Skill stored my generated skills.
